payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial, vertically oriented white-painted picture frame with a thin profile and clear glass; the framed area shows a light, foliage-like image or view and the right edge of the frame is clipped by the crop, suggesting the object is close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
